scripts.lint:types: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p clients/web/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/auth/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/db/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/design-system/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/storybook-base/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p servers/api/tsconfig.json
scripts.ai: pnpm check && pnpm lint:types && pnpm exec fallow --format json --quiet --explain
